text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Such a dejected sigh doesn't suit you.
What happened to your usual screams?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, I was just taking a breather! It's so hard
thinking up how to put on a killer show!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Is that right? Come with me, then. I've got
something I think you'll enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You brought me to a Santa Monica
concert!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna put on a cool show, then I gotta learn
from the best! Was that what you had in mind?
You're awesome, Pearl!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You catch on quick! Now come on, the show's
starting! Let's go crazy!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text: YEEEAH! SANTA MONICA ROCKS!

text_block_list.name: Santa Monica
text_block_list.text:
This will be our last song! So let me hear you
screeeeam!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's this song... Heh... It sure brings back
memories.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is this one special to you?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Right after I failed my entrance exam, I
came across this song and found out about Santa
Monica for the first time.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
I was amazed by the power of music—how easily
you can forget all your worries by shouting along
with the music.

text_block_list.name: Santa Monica
text_block_list.text: LOVE AND PEEEAAAACE!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Rock on! ♪ What a powerful scream. You can
really feel all the emotions she's pouring into it.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text: Emotions, huh...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Pearl? Do you think my screams have the
ability to empower people?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I like your screams. They're energetic and
really cool.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But... not everyone can enjoy that kind of
piercing and aggressive sound, you know?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Either way, that's not quite the quality you're
trying to emulate from the band you admire, is it?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
You're right... It's been so long since I'd actually
been to a concert. Now I realize how much of a
poser I've been...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
I don't want my music to be just about shouting. I
want to inspire people to stay positive, but I lost
sight of that somewhere along the way...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But that's okay. It doesn't matter if you take
detours or outright stop in the middle of your
journey.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't change the fact that you've started
working toward your dream, of your own volition.
You should be proud of that.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
So go run after that light, now that you've found
it again. You're the only one who can follow the
path of your dream.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! Remember the girl with the guitar I told
you about? She put out a new song recently!
Here, take a listen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the earbuds Seeking the Pearl holds out to
me and put them in.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad to hear that! Everyone's sure to love
this song!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't listening to it just fill your heart with the
courage to keep moving forward, even in the face
of adversity?
choice_data_list:
I'm sure this will resonate with all kinds of
people!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Woo! I knew it! Things are about to get busy!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I have to promote it on the academy's PA system,
establish connections at all the music venues...
Oh, and set up an UmaTube channel for her!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's all I can do, though. The rest will be up to
her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl can't help but wish the best for
her aspiring musician friend and is doing
everything in her power to help her succeed!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hm! ♪ That's great! It seems her passion
really came through!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
It was like, whoooaa, waaaaahh, ooooohhh!
Right?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! I think everyone should hear it! I'm
going to ask them to broadcast it through the
academy's PA system! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl is absolutely bursting with
excitement as she skips her way to the school
building.
